commands.review_summary:
The PR adds an opencode-go provider-owned stalled-stream wrapper with first-event and idle abort timers, wires it into the plugin stream wrapper chain, and adds focused stream termination tests.

PR surface: Source +388, Tests +712. Total +1100 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source/proof level: the linked issue has concrete stuck-session logs, current main lacks this provider guard, and the PR tests simulate the stalled stream paths. I did not force the intermittent public opencode-go provider outage live.
